blended.narrative: Mont-Sainte-Anne is looking at a significant storm over the next 48 hours, with 26 inches of snowfall of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,841 ft. Looking ahead, 45 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 14" of heavy snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Thursday: 12" of heavy snow, highs of 32°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 6" of snow, highs of 26°F. Expect powder.
Monday: 9" of heavy snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
